# Startups get 1 year of Fin free + 93% off Intercom

Fin AI Agent delivers seamless and personal experiences across the entire customer journey from sales to support. The early stage includes 300 free Fin outcomes, 15 free sales qualifications per month and the Intercom Helpdesk from $65 per month.

Fin AI Agent for startupsEarly Stage Program

Join 10,000+ fast-growing startups using Fin + Intercom

## Save year on year.

Year 1

93% off

300 free Fin outcomes and 15 free Fin qualifications monthly. Phone, SMS, and WhatsApp charged at list price.

View pricing →

Year 2

50% off

150 free Fin outcomes and 15 free Fin qualifications monthly. Phone, SMS, and WhatsApp charged at list price. [...] ## FAQs

The Early Stage Program gives you access to the Intercom AI-first helpdesk from $65/month with tiered discounts over 3 years: 93% off in Year 1, 50% off in Year 2, and 25% off in Year 3. Year 1 includes 6 Advanced Seats, 6 Copilot Seats, 20 Lite Seats, Proactive Support Plus (500 messages/month), 300 Fin outcomes/month, 15 Fin qualifications/month, and Pro tier access. The 93% discount also applies to usage-based email, messages over 500/month, and additional seats beyond the included 6. Phone, SMS, and WhatsApp are charged at list price. [...] Year 1 includes 300 Fin outcomes/month & 15 Fin qualifications/month. Beyond these inclusions outcomes cost $0.99 each (including resolutions, procedure handoffs, and disqualifications) and qualifications cost $9.99 each (for lead qualification and routing).

Your discount steps down over time: 93% off in Year 1, 50% off in Year 2, and 25% off in Year 3. Free Fin usage also reduces over time. If the costs become too high after your first year, you can move onto our Essential plan starting at $39 per seat per month.

If your company has more than 15 employees, you’re not eligible for the Early Stage Program. However, you can start a free trial of any of our regular plans on the pricing page, or reach out through Messenger to speak with the sales team about other options.

## Frequently asked questions

Everything you need to know about the Intercom Startup Pack.

### Who is eligible for the Intercom Startup Pack? [...] ### How long do I have to redeem the offers?

Most offers can be redeemed within 60 days of approval. Each partner may have specific terms which will be shared upon acceptance.

### Can I apply if my startup isn't launched yet?

Yes. Pre-launch startups are eligible as long as you have a working prototype or MVP and can demonstrate how these tools will accelerate your go-to-market.

### How many perks can I redeem?

You can apply to all relevant perks. Some partners may require separate approval.

### Do I need to be an Intercom customer?

No. You don't need to be a current Intercom customer to apply for the Startup Pack.

results.title: How Much Does Intercom's Fin AI Cost? 2026 Pricin...
results.content:
#### Are there discounts for startups using Fin AI?

Yes. Intercom's Early Stage Program offers eligible startups 93% off Intercom seat pricing plus a full year of Fin AI Agent (around $6,500 in value) at no additional cost. Eligibility is based on funding stage, headcount, and company age, with the program designed for early-stage venture-backed companies.

#### Is there a cheaper alternative to Fin AI with similar pricing? [...] ### Fin standalone (with your existing helpdesk)

If you already run on Salesforce, HubSpot, Freshworks, Dixa, Front, Zoho, Sprinklr, or Gorgias, you can buy Fin without any Intercom plan.

Pricing: $0.99 per outcome, 50 outcomes per month minimum (so the floor is $49.50/month). No seat charges from Fin's side, unlimited teammates, no integration or setup fees.

You're still paying your existing helpdesk on top of this. Fin just replaces the AI layer.

### Fin + Intercom

If you're on Intercom (or want to be), Fin comes bundled with all three Intercom plans. You pay per Full seat plus $0.99 per Fin outcome. The seat prices below are Intercom's billed-annually rates, and paying monthly costs more per seat.

results.title: Intercom Startup Offer: 100% off 1st Year + 50% off Second - 2026
results.content:
This program gives early stage startups access to Intercom’s full customer messaging and AI support platform, including Fin AI, Copilot, multiple seat types, proactive support tools and monthly Fin resolution allowances, while dramatically reducing the cost of running customer support, sales, and onboarding at scale.

At FounderPass, we recommend this program to founders who want to build world class customer communication without burning cash on enterprise software in their early years.

These channels are charged at Intercom’s standard list pricing. Fin AI resolutions above the included allowance are charged at $0.99 per resolution.

## How the discount works over time

Year 1 - 100% discount with 300 free Fin resolutions per month.

Year 2 - 50% discount with 150 free Fin resolutions per month.

Year 3 - 25% discount with 75 free Fin resolutions per month.

After the startup program, you can move onto an Intercom plan to meet you needs at that time.

## Intercom offer FAQs

### Who is this Intercom offer for?

Early stage startups at Series A or below with fewer than 25 employees who are new Intercom customers.

### What do I get in the first year?

You receive the Startup Partner Program with a 100% discount and 300 free Fin AI resolutions per month.

### What happens after the first year?
